projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A dynamic full-stack personal portfolio website built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js. Implements modular architecture, asynchronous callbacks, and JSON data handling.

projects.title: Student's Internal Marks Management System
projects.description: A secure web-based system designed to streamline student internal assessment management.

projects.title: Password-Protected Image Steganography
projects.description: A secure steganography system developed to hide and retrieve confidential messages within images using pixel manipulation techniques.
